allowances.rationale: Next 16.2.10 embeds PostCSS below 8.5.10. npm offers only a forced downgrade to Next 9.3.3, which is a breaking and incompatible remediation for this existing vinext site. The site does not accept user-authored CSS, reducing exposure, but the advisory remains real and time-boxed rather than silently suppressed.
review_triggers: Any change to website/package.json or website/package-lock.json
Any new Next, vinext, or PostCSS release
The expiry date, even if dependencies are otherwise unchanged
